name: Question
about: Ask a question about usage or functionality
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## ❓ Question

A clear and concise question.

## 🔍 Context

What are you trying to accomplish? What have you tried so far?

## 📋 Relevant Information

- Skill: [e.g. web-documentation-reader, github-project-learner]
- Command/Script: [e.g. extract_docs.py]
- Documentation checked: [Yes/No - which docs?]

## 📝 Additional Details

Any other information that might help answer your question.
